label: The Nightcaliber Exchange
description: The Nightcaliber Exchange is a compact arms-shop set into the vitrified stone of Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion, its facade reinforced with scavenged wreck-plate and slit-like viewports. Racks and wall-lockers of blackened metal line the interior in regimented bays, each secured by numbered seals and heavy restraint bars suited to a fortress city under constant threat. The air carries the tang of promethium oil and abrasive ash, held at bay by gasketed doors and a low-pressure filtration hood that hums against the bastion’s vox-fouled atmosphere. A recessed counter of slagcrete and ceramite dominates the front, backed by a gridded ledger wall and a stubby auspex post built to function under auroral interference.
